---
name: Methodology question
about: You think a rule, anti-pattern, or grading boundary should change
title: "[METHODOLOGY] "
labels: methodology
assignees: ''
---

## Which rule are you discussing

Quote the exact rule from `SKILL.md` or `references/` and link to the file.

## What you think should change

Describe the proposed change and why.

## Concrete scenario

Give a real (or representative) scenario where the current rule produced a bad outcome, or where it forced unnecessary process.

## Risk if the rule changes

Honestly describe what could go wrong if your proposed change is accepted. Loop Engineering is intentionally conservative; changes that loosen the human gate, the evaluator separation, or the auto-downgrade mechanism need very strong justification.

## Additional context

Links, prior discussions, or examples from your own loops.
